2606.14278.title: Does the Judge Prefer English? Evaluating Language-Switching Invariance in LLM-as-a-Judge
2606.14278.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) are now widely used as automatic judges for open-ended instruction-following evaluation. This practice is convenient, scalable, and often more semantically aware than reference-based metrics, but it also introduces a new reliability question: does a judge evaluate the quality of an answer, or does it also react to the language in which the comparison is presented? We propose Judge-LS, a lightweight meta-evaluation protocol that transforms LLMBar response-pair items into English, Chinese, and Chinese-English language-switched variants. A reliable judge should preserve its preference under label-preserving language transformations and should not prefer a language when two answers are translation-equivalent. We evaluate four API-accessible judges on the full 419-item LLMBar benchmark, producing 13,408 successful pairwise judgments. Across models, Chinese and language-switched presentations induce 10.7--14.4% preference flips relative to English, and all judges achieve their highest accuracy in English. However, translation-equivalent tie probes do not reveal a systematic English preference: most probes are judged as ties, and non-tie decisions more often favor Chinese. We add confidence intervals, paired significance tests, and an automatic transformation audit with a sensitivity analysis that excludes mechanically flagged high-risk variants. The experiment requires no model training, uses only API calls, and is feasible on modest local hardware.
2606.14278.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）現在被廣泛用作開放式指令跟隨評估的自動評審。<lb/>這種做法方便、可擴展，並且通常比基於參考的指標更具語義意識，但它也引入了一個新的可靠性問題：評審是評估答案的質量，還是也會對比較所呈現的語言作出反應？<lb/>我們提出了Judge-LS，一種輕量級的元評估協議，它將LLMBar的回應對項目轉換為英語、中文和中英語切換變體。<lb/>一個可靠的評審應該在保留標籤的語言轉換下保持其偏好，並且在兩個答案是翻譯等價時不應偏好某一語言。<lb/>我們在完整的419項LLMBar基準上評估了四個可通過API訪問的評審，產生了13,408個成功的成對判斷。<lb/>在各模型中，中文和語言切換的呈現相對於英語引起了10.7--14.4%的偏好翻轉，所有評審在英語中的準確性最高。<lb/>然而，翻譯等價的平局探測並未顯示出系統性的英語偏好：大多數探測被判定為平局，而非平局的決策則更常偏向中文。<lb/>我們添加了置信區間、成對顯著性檢驗，以及一個自動轉換審計，並進行了敏感性分析，排除了機械標記的高風險變體。<lb/>這項實驗不需要模型訓練，只使用API調用，並且在適度的本地硬體上可行。
2606.14278.author: Shaojie Yin et.al.
